data.body:
AC amendment: Add .test-index entry requirement.

The structural boundary test tests/skills/test-sprint-pause-state-skill-boundary.sh does not fuzzy-match plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (normalized source 'sprintskillmd' is not a substring of test name 'testsprintpausestateskillboundarysh'). A .test-index entry is required to avoid a false-negative in the pre-commit test gate.

Add to acceptance criteria:
- [ ] .test-index updated with entry: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-sprint-pause-state-skill-boundary.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint/SKILL.md.*test-sprint-pause-state-skill-boundary' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
